title: Blog with Newsletter (Payload CMS + Resend)
description: Build a content-driven blog with a subscriber newsletter: Payload CMS for content management, React Email for templates, Resend for delivery, and Inngest for scheduled and triggered sends.

steps.description: Scaffold Next.js App Router with TypeScript
Tailwind CSS v4 for blog post layout and subscriber form styling
UI components for subscriber forms, newsletter opt-in banner, and post cards
Headless CMS for blog posts, authors, tags, and subscriber list management via the built-in admin panel
Type-safe React components for welcome email and newsletter digest templates
Reliable email delivery for welcome emails on subscribe and newsletter broadcasts
Trigger welcome emails on subscribe event; schedule weekly newsletter digests with cron; retry failed sends automatically
Production deployment — note: Payload CMS requires an external Postgres database (e.g., Neon or Railway Postgres)
